experience.title: Cloud & DevOps Engineer
items: Lead technical assessments and cloud audits, and deliver modernization and migration roadmaps for enterprise platforms
Design, deploy, and operate cloud-native and hybrid infrastructure using Terraform and Ansible, with strong automation and reliability focus
Build and operate container platforms on Kubernetes (including Azure Kubernetes Service) and Docker, with GitOps-driven delivery patterns
Define and implement CI/CD pipelines with Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, and GitLab CI/CD to improve release quality and deployment frequency
Own SRE operations: incident response, post-mortems, toil reduction, runbook automation, and continuous service improvement
Deploy and administer observability platforms (Dynatrace, CloudWatch, Grafana), build dashboards and alerts, and drive performance tuning
Apply DevSecOps controls across pipelines and cloud environments, including vulnerability reduction and policy-based governance

Delivered a major Azure transformation from a legacy VM stack (Apache, PHP-FPM) to PaaS services: App Service with Docker containers, Azure Container Registry, and MySQL Flexible Server, automated with Terraform and Azure DevOps pipelines

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
items: Designed and maintained cloud infrastructure across AWS, Azure, and GCP for multiple client environments, balancing reliability, performance, and cost
Built and improved CI/CD workflows (GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Jenkins) to standardize releases and reduce manual deployment effort
Automated provisioning and operations using Infrastructure as Code and scripting (Terraform, Ansible, Bash, Python)
Supported containerized platforms and workloads (Docker, Kubernetes), including troubleshooting, scaling, and day-2 operations
Managed and supported platform.sh environments as part of delivery and production operations
Led incident response, root-cause analysis, and preventive remediation actions to improve service stability

experience.title: Linux System Engineer
items: Deployed and maintained Linux servers with HA DB setups and automated backups (MinIO, Bash)
Automated on-prem networking (Proxmox): VPNs, firewalls, load balancers (HAProxy, ProxySQL)
Handled incidents, changes, and database ops (setup, replication, troubleshooting)
Collaborated on monitoring automation and documented processes (EN/FR) in KBs and runbooks

experience.title: Linux System Administrator
items: Resolved critical incidents and implemented resilient infrastructure solutions across hybrid cloud setups
Managed and automated network configs: VPNs, SSL certs, HA/load balancers (HAProxy, Azure/GCP/AWS), diagnostics
Collaborated on presales activities and technical solution design with stakeholders
Authored bilingual (EN/FR) documentation, runbooks, and contributed to internal knowledge base
Delivered 24/7 support and mentored junior staff in incident response and system operations
